heading: Federal swimming pool and spa drain cover standard
label: 8003 Federal swimming pool and spa drain cover standard

children.heading: Consumer product safety rule
children.label: a Consumer product safety rule
children.text: The requirements described in subsection (b) shall be treated as a consumer product safety rule issued by the Consumer Product Safety Commission under the Consumer Product Safety Act ( et seq.).15 U.S.C. 2051

children.heading: Drain cover standard
children.label: b Drain cover standard
children.text: Effective 1 year after , each swimming pool or spa drain cover manufactured, distributed, or entered into commerce in the United States shall conform to the entrapment protection standards of the ASME/ANSI A112.19.8 performance standard, or any successor standard regulating such swimming pool or drain cover. If a successor standard is proposed, the American Society of Mechanical Engineers shall notify the Commission of the proposed revision. If the Commission determines that the proposed revision is in the public interest, it shall incorporate the revision into the standard after providing 30 days notice to the public.December 19, 2007

children.label: i
children.text: each public pool and spa in the United States shall be equipped with anti-entrapment devices or systems that comply with the ASME/ANSI A112.19.8 performance standard, or any successor standard; and

children.heading: Safety vacuum release system
children.label: I Safety vacuum release system
children.text: A safety vacuum release system which ceases operation of the pump, reverses the circulation flow, or otherwise provides a vacuum release at a suction outlet when a blockage is detected, that has been tested by an independent third party and found to conform to ASME/ANSI standard A112.19.17 or ASTM standard F2387.

children.heading: Suction-limiting vent system
children.label: II Suction-limiting vent system
children.text: A suction-limiting vent system with a tamper-resistant atmospheric opening.

children.heading: Gravity drainage system
children.label: III Gravity drainage system
children.text: A gravity drainage system that utilizes a collector tank.

children.heading: Drain disablement
children.label: V Drain disablement
children.text: A device or system that disables the drain.

children.heading: Other systems
children.label: VI Other systems
children.text: Any other system determined by the Commission to be equally effective as, or better than, the systems described in subclauses (I) through (V) of this clause at preventing or eliminating the risk of injury or death associated with pool drainage systems.

children.heading: Applicable standards
children.label: B Applicable standards
children.text: Any device or system described in subparagraph (A)(ii) shall meet the requirements of any ASME/ANSI or ASTM performance standard if there is such a standard for such a device or system, or any applicable consumer product safety standard.

children.label: A
children.text: open to the public generally, whether for a fee or free of charge;

children.label: i
children.text: members of an organization and their guests;

children.label: ii
children.text: residents of a multi-unit apartment building, apartment complex, residential real estate development, or other multi-family residential area (other than a municipality, township, or other local government jurisdiction); or

children.label: iii
children.text: patrons of a hotel or other public accommodations facility; or

children.label: C
children.text: operated by the Federal Government (or by a concessionaire on behalf of the Federal Government) for the benefit of members of the Armed Forces and their dependents or employees of any department or agency and their dependents.

children.heading: Enforcement
children.label: 3 Enforcement
children.text: Violation of paragraph (1) shall be considered to be a violation of section 19(a)(1) of the Consumer Product Safety Act () and may also be enforced under section 17 of that Act ().15 U.S.C. 2068(a)(1)15 U.S.C. 2066
